evidence: Added tests-first Lezer migration gates: tests/editor-live-preview-no-regex-parsers.test.ts, tests/editor-live-preview-parser-facade.test.ts, parser facade/barrel expectation in tests/editor-package-wiring.test.ts, malformed adjacent checkbox fixture in tests/editor-task-toggle.test.ts, and frontmatter/callout parser-order fixture in tests/editor-live-preview-semantic-fixtures.test.ts. Verification intentionally fails before implementation: pnpm vitest run those five files fails on current regex parser paths, missing private parser facade/@codemirror/language direct dependency, raw markdown() editor setup, and malformed task marker acceptance.

evidence: Introduced packages/editor/src/live-preview/markdown-language.ts as the private Zorid Markdown facade using @codemirror/lang-markdown plus @lezer/markdown extensions for frontmatter, callouts, wiki links, tags, and highlights; routed editor setup through zoridMarkdown(); removed markdown-code-context from the live-preview barrel; added direct parser/language dependencies. Verification: pnpm vitest run tests/editor-live-preview-parser-facade.test.ts tests/editor-package-wiring.test.ts passed (2 files, 7 tests); pnpm --filter @zorid/editor typecheck passed; broader migration gate run still intentionally fails only on later-story regex renderer/task-toggle gates.

evidence: Added syntax-tree based Live Preview public range collection in packages/editor/src/live-preview/syntax-tree-ranges.ts using CodeMirror/Lezer syntaxTreeAvailable/ensureSyntaxTree with a bounded fallback parser state. Migrated public heading/inline-code/strong/emphasis/strikethrough/highlight/markdown-link/wiki-link/tag renderers in renderers.ts off regex helpers while preserving LivePreviewRange output and inline-code delimiter activation ranges. Verification: pnpm vitest run tests/editor-live-preview-primitives.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-blocks.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-semantic-fixtures.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-parser-facade.test.ts passed (4 files, 27 tests); pnpm --filter @zorid/editor typecheck passed. Broader migration gate still intentionally fails on later-story internal renderer/task-toggle regex/malformed-task work.

evidence: Migrated internal Live Preview suppression and widget paths to Lezer-derived ranges: markdown-code-context now reads Zorid syntax nodes for frontmatter/fenced/indented suppression; blockquote, code-block widget, callout widget, and task checkbox ranges now come from syntax tree/block nodes; task toggle uses Lezer TaskMarker nodes and rejects malformed adjacent markers. Verification: pnpm vitest run tests/editor-live-preview-no-regex-parsers.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-parser-facade.test.ts tests/editor-task-toggle.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-primitives.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-blocks.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-callouts.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-widgets.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-semantic-fixtures.test.ts tests/editor-package-wiring.test.ts passed (9 files, 69 tests); pnpm --filter @zorid/editor typecheck passed.
